sections.label: Chorus
lines: Lamdang lua e! (Aw lamdang lua e!),
Pian dang lua e! (Aw pian dang lua e!)
ding ka sak ding la; (Ka sak ding ka sak ding la)
Lamdang lua e (Aw lamdang lua e!),
Ka Honpa’n kei hong itna (Ka Honpa’n kei hong itna).

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Huan sungah thu hong ngetsak in,
Kei hang khua-ul, si luang hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Khuavak gam pan en uh hi;
Kei nem ding hong paisuk hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Ka mawh ka dahna teng la-in,

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Hong itna la ka sa dinga,
